g.text: Certus storage backends, single client · 4 SSD (Part 3): throughput vs. latency

text.style: font-size: 10px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #6b7280

g.text: 4 MiB KV-cache objects on 4 SSDs — throughput: higher is better; latency: p99 per object, lower is better.

text.style: font-size: 8.5px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #6b7280

g.text: † RAID0 run reported aggregate = 4× per-client and a 4-client-like latency profile; per-client values plotted. Benchmark: 4 MiB blocks, 16 objects/batch, 10 iterations, 672 objects (160 cold), 2 GiB pool.
